001package guiGradebook;
002
003import java.util.List;
004
005public class ControllerGradebook {
006
007        private static final ModelGradebook model = new ModelGradebook();
008
009        public ControllerGradebook() {
010        }
011
012        protected static void loadStudents() {
013                List<String> students = model.getStudentsWithReplies();
014                ViewGradebook.list_Students.getItems().clear();
015                ViewGradebook.list_Students.getItems().addAll(students);
016
017                if (students.isEmpty()) {
018                        ViewGradebook.text_Review.setText("No student replies are available yet.");
019                } else {
020                        ViewGradebook.text_Review.setText("Select a student to view rule-of-three proof.");
021                }
022        }
023
024        protected static void reviewSelectedStudent() {
025                String selected = ViewGradebook.list_Students.getSelectionModel().getSelectedItem();
026                String reviewText = model.buildStudentReviewText(selected);
027                ViewGradebook.text_Review.setText(reviewText);
028        }
029
030        protected static boolean canAccess() {
031                return model.canAccessGradebook(ViewGradebook.theUser);
032        }
033
034        protected static void performReturn() {
035                if (ViewGradebook.theUser != null && ViewGradebook.theUser.getAdminRole()) {
036                        guiAdminHome.ViewAdminHome.displayAdminHome(ViewGradebook.theStage, ViewGradebook.theUser);
037                        return;
038                }
039                guiStaffHome.ViewStaffHome.displayStaffHome(ViewGradebook.theStage, ViewGradebook.theUser);
040        }
041}
